narrative:
Niles City has 11,617 registered voters, with 57.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 7.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 35.6%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 28.3 percentage points.
